info.title: QUiCK API V2
info.description:
# Welcome to the QUiCK API

This collection mirrors the current public API and keeps a familiar Postman-friendly structure.

It is designed to make testing and integration a little smoother, whether you are exploring the API for the first time or building on top of it.

# Authentication

The default authentication method is an API token:

> Authorization: Token [token]

You can also send the optional company header when needed:

> Quick-Company-Id: [company_id]

If the header is present but does not belong to the same company as the token, the request fails with `Company ID does not match`.

Some `/2` endpoints also accept OAuth2 bearer tokens. In that case, use:

> Authorization: Bearer [access_token]
>
> Quick-Company-Id: [company_id]

OAuth-only endpoints in this collection:

- `/2/companies`
- `/2/user-profile`

# Pagination

`v1` list endpoints use classic page-based pagination with `page` and `page_size`.

`v2` cursor-based endpoints return `next` and `previous` URLs. To continue browsing results, simply follow the URL returned by the API. You can still use `page_size` when supported.

# Extra Fields

Some endpoints let you expand the response with a comma-separated `fields` query parameter:

- `v1` expenses: `items`, `payment_history`, `accounting`
- `v2` expenses: `items`, `payment_history`, `accounting`, `post_its`
- incomes: `items`, `payment_history`
- documents: `details`, `attached`
- monthly taxes: `taxes`
- monthly salaries: `salaries`

# Common Enums

## Paid status

| Value | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | not paid |
| 2 | paid |
| 3 | partially paid |

## Payment method

| Value | Meaning |
| --- | --- |
| transfer | wire transfer |
| cash | cash payment |
| card | bank card payment |
| cod | cash on delivery |

post.description:
Bulk-accept the selected expenses that are currently in quarantine.

Authentication: Use an API token (`Authorization: Token {{token}}`).

Bulk-approve the selected expenses.

Authentication: Use an API token (`Authorization: Token {{token}}`).

Remove approval from the selected expenses in bulk.

Authentication: Use an API token (`Authorization: Token {{token}}`).

Mark the selected expenses as checked.

Authentication: Use an API token (`Authorization: Token {{token}}`).

Mark the selected expenses as exported.

Authentication: Use an API token (`Authorization: Token {{token}}`).

Remove the checked status from the selected expenses.

Authentication: Use an API token (`Authorization: Token {{token}}`).

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Optional expansions: `items`, `payment_history`, `accounting`.

get.description:
Retrieve the full details of a specific expense.

Authentication: Use an API token (`Authorization: Token {{token}}`).

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Optional expansions: `items`, `payment_history`, `accounting`, `post_its`.

get.description:
Retrieve the full details of a specific expense.

Authentication: Use an API token (`Authorization: Token {{token}}`).

patch.description:
Update a specific expense.

Authentication: Use an API token, or OAuth2 with `Authorization: Bearer [access_token]` and `Quick-Company-Id`.

post.description:
Check whether the company already has an artifact with the same file name and size.

Authentication: Use an API token, or OAuth2 with `Authorization: Bearer [access_token]` and `Quick-Company-Id`.

Create one or more expenses via the public API.

Authentication: Use an API token, or OAuth2 with `Authorization: Bearer [access_token]` and `Quick-Company-Id`.

parameters.name: date_field
parameters.description:
Supported values:

* `fulfilled_at` - filter by fulfillment date
* `due_at` - filter by due date
* `created` - filter by creation timestamp
* `created_at` - filter by creation date

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description:
Sort results by:

* `planned_payment_date` - planned payment date or due date
* `-planned_payment_date` - planned payment date or due date (descending)
* `invoice_number` - invoice number
* `-invoice_number` - invoice number (descending)
* `partner` - partner name
* `-partner` - partner name (descending)
* `gross_amount` - gross amount
* `-gross_amount` - gross amount (descending)
* `paid` - paid status
* `-paid` - paid status (descending)
* `expense_types` - expense types
* `-expense_types` - expense types (descending)
* `tags` - tag names
* `-tags` - tag names (descending)
* `filing_number` - filing number
* `-filing_number` - filing number (descending)
* `created` - creation date
* `-created` - creation date (descending)
* `expense_type` - expense type names
* `-expense_type` - expense type names (descending)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number to return.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of records to return per page.

parameters.name: paid_status
parameters.description:
Paid status values:

* `1` - not paid
* `2` - paid
* `3` - partially paid

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Optional expansions: `items`, `payment_history`, `accounting`.

get.description:
Retrieve a paginated list of expenses.

Authentication: Use an API token (`Authorization: Token {{token}}`).

parameters.name: date_field
parameters.description:
Supported values:

* `due_at` - filter by due date
* `fulfilled_at` - filter by fulfillment date
* `issued_at` - filter by issue date
* `created_at` - filter by creation date
* `accounting_period` - filter by accounting period
* `financial_fulfillment` - filter by financial fulfillment date
* `exported_at` - filter by export date
* `vat_period` - filter by VAT period

parameters.name: has_accounting_id
parameters.description: Whether the record already has an accounting ID.

parameters.name: has_accounting_todo
parameters.description: Whether the record has an accounting to-do.

parameters.name: has_approvals
parameters.description: Whether the record already has approvals.

parameters.name: has_artifact
parameters.description: Whether an invoice artifact is available.

parameters.name: has_attachment
parameters.description: Whether an attachment is available.

parameters.name: has_expense_type
parameters.description: Whether the expense has already been categorized.

parameters.name: has_post_it
parameters.description: Whether a post-it note is present.

parameters.name: has_unfinished_accounting_todo
parameters.description: Whether the record has an unfinished accounting to-do.

parameters.name: has_vat_period
parameters.description: Whether the record already has a VAT period.

parameters.name: is_accounting_exported
parameters.description: Whether the record has already been exported.

parameters.name: is_accounting_todo_done
parameters.description: Whether the accounting to-do is already completed.

parameters.name: is_approved
parameters.description: Whether the record is approved.

parameters.name: is_duplicate
parameters.description: Whether the record is marked as duplicate.

parameters.name: is_excluded_from_accounting
parameters.description: Whether the record is excluded from accounting.

parameters.name: is_expired
parameters.description: Whether the record is overdue.

parameters.name: is_expiring
parameters.description: Whether the record is due soon.

parameters.name: is_filed
parameters.description: Whether the record is filed.

parameters.name: is_installment
parameters.description: Whether the record is partially paid.

parameters.name: is_nav
parameters.description: Whether the invoice comes from NAV.

parameters.name: is_new
parameters.description: Whether the invoice is new.

parameters.name: is_paid
parameters.description: Whether the record is paid.

parameters.name: is_processed
parameters.description: Whether the accountant has already processed the record.

parameters.name: is_ready_to_acounto_sync
parameters.description: Whether the record is ready to sync to Acounto. Use `true` or leave it empty. Required as `true` when `action=sync`.

parameters.name: is_ready_to_sync
parameters.description: Whether the record is ready to sync to the accounting system (for example, számlázz.hu). Use `true` or leave it empty. Required as `true` when `action=sync`.

parameters.name: is_synced
parameters.description: Whether the record has already been synced to the accounting system (for example, számlázz.hu).

parameters.name: is_updated
parameters.description: Whether the invoice has been updated.

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description:
Sort results by:

* `id` - ID
* `-id` - ID (descending)
* `due_at` - due date
* `-due_at` - due date (descending)
* `fulfilled_at` - fulfillment date
* `-fulfilled_at` - fulfillment date (descending)
* `partner_name` - partner name
* `-partner_name` - partner name (descending)
* `expense_type_names` - expense type names
* `-expense_type_names` - expense type names (descending)
* `tag_names` - tag names
* `-tag_names` - tag names (descending)
* `invoice_number` - invoice number
* `-invoice_number` - invoice number (descending)
* `planned_payment_date` - planned payment date
* `-planned_payment_date` - planned payment date (descending)
* `gross_amount` - gross amount
* `-gross_amount` - gross amount (descending)
* `filing_number` - filing number
* `-filing_number` - filing number (descending)
* `paid_status` - paid status
* `-paid_status` - paid status (descending)
